components.provenance: scripts/vendor-browserfs.js copies the exact npm distribution, license, and package metadata, then deterministically replaces its two dynamic global-scope lookups for extension CSP compatibility.
scripts/vendor-mupdf.js copies the runtime, package metadata, and license from the exact npm dependency locked by package-lock.json. The source revision is the official MuPDF 1.28.0 release tag.

components.license: GPL-2.0-or-later, LGPL-2.1-or-later, and other linked-component terms; inventory incomplete
components.provenance: The version is embedded in the WASM binary. The current pdftex.bc bytes first appear as wasm/pdftex.bc in repository commit 75ec270cec23774e8e75eeec8aaf747223826b98 and move to their current path in e3f9ae22f51d2cb98c14b166485ad2a4c276bdb1. Embedded LLVM metadata identifies Clang 6.0.1, emscripten-fastcomp-clang commit 98df4be387dde3e3918fa5bbb5fc43e1a0e1daac, emscripten-fastcomp commit 6c7e775325067e33fa60611e619a8b987b6d0c35, Emscripten version strings 1.38.44 and 1.38.31, and include paths from tag 1.39.4. These clues do not identify the exact TeX Live source revision or provide a supported, reproducible build recipe.

components.license: Mixed TeX Live component licenses; inventory incomplete
components.provenance: scripts/vendor-texlive.js checks out the immutable source revision, copies the fixed LaTeX/AMS runtime and required font families, and generates the packaged BrowserFS index. The revision also supplies a prebuilt pdflatex.fmt dated 2020-03-22. Its format-generation recipe and complete source/license inputs are not present; embedded paths identify additional LaTeX, Babel, and hyphenation inputs. This remains a production source and license review blocker.
